svg.text: Full-Stack Architecture Flow: Web · Android · iOS → AI Execution
⚡ API GATEWAY — FastAPI + Nginx Reverse Proxy
Routes → steer:8001 · skill:8002 · auth:8003 · ai-orchestrator:8004 · notification:8005 · document:8006
↔ RabbitMQ EVENT BUS — Domain Events flowing between all services ↔
● LAYER 4 — AI EXECUTION (Local · Private · No Cloud API)
45+ Unit Tests (file validator · doc-svc · JWT · 3 AI chains · embeddings) · 14 Integration Tests · 5 Security / Prompt-Injection Tests · 85%+ Coverage Target
